# TalkBox

> OSS LLM Chat UI - Simple like Streamlit, powerful like ChatGPT

## Overview

TalkBox is an open-source chat interface for Large Language Models. It provides a modern, accessible, and multilingual chat experience.

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Headless UI, Vite
- Backend: Hono (TypeScript), Drizzle ORM
- Database: MySQL/MariaDB
- State: Zustand
- i18n: react-i18next (Japanese/English)

## Project Structure

```
talkbox/
├── apps/
│   ├── api/              # Hono backend API
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── routes/   # API endpoints
│   │   │   ├── services/ # LLM providers
│   │   │   └── db/       # Database schema
│   └── web/              # React frontend
│       ├── src/
│       │   ├── components/  # UI components
│       │   ├── stores/      # Zustand stores
│       │   ├── hooks/       # Custom hooks
│       │   └── i18n/        # Translations
├── packages/
│   └── shared/           # Shared types
└── docker/               # Docker configs
```

## Key Files

- `apps/web/src/App.tsx` - Main app component with routing
- `apps/web/src/stores/chat.ts` - Chat state management
- `apps/web/src/stores/conversations.ts` - Conversation list state
- `apps/api/src/index.ts` - API entry point
- `apps/api/src/routes/chat.ts` - Chat streaming endpoint
- `apps/api/src/services/llm/` - LLM provider abstraction

## Conventions

- Immutable state updates (Zustand)
- Functional components with hooks
- Tailwind CSS for styling
- i18n keys in `apps/web/src/i18n/locales/`
- API routes prefixed with `/api/v1/`

## Commands

- `pnpm dev` - Start development servers
- `pnpm build` - Production build
- `pnpm lint` - Run linters
